channel.title: www.aihero.dev
channel.description: AI Hero - AI Engineering for Curious Professional Developers

item.title: v1.1: /wayfinder, /to-spec, /to-tickets, /grilling improvements, and much more
item.description: Skills v1.1 released: Learn new agent skills for AI coding including Wayfinder for planning, spec improvements, and TDD refactoring.
item.content:encoded: Skills v1.1 released: Learn new agent skills for AI coding including Wayfinder for planning, spec improvements, and TDD refactoring.

item.title: The /grill-me Skill
item.description: A guide to Matt Pocock's grill-me skill for resolving design decisions before implementation.
item.content:encoded: A guide to Matt Pocock's grill-me skill for resolving design decisions before implementation.

item.title: How To Kill The Bloat In Claude Code's System Prompt
AI Skills for Real Engineers
item.description: A practical skill system for engineers who want to use AI without giving up their standards.
item.content:encoded: A practical skill system for engineers who want to use AI without giving up their standards.

item.title: triage: Turn Backlog Mess Into Agent-Ready Work
item.description: Learn how to use the Triage skill to organize GitHub issues, turn messy ideas into actionable tasks for AI agents, and manage backlogs efficiently.
item.content:encoded: Learn how to use the Triage skill to organize GitHub issues, turn messy ideas into actionable tasks for AI agents, and manage backlogs efficiently.

item.title: The /improve-codebase-architecture Skill
item.description: A guide to the improve-codebase-architecture skill for finding refactors that make code easier to test, change, and navigate with agents.
item.content:encoded: A guide to the improve-codebase-architecture skill for finding refactors that make code easier to test, change, and navigate with agents.

item.title: The /prototype Skill
item.description: A guide to the prototype skill for testing UI, state, and product decisions before committing to implementation.
item.content:encoded: A guide to the prototype skill for testing UI, state, and product decisions before committing to implementation.

item.title: The /handoff Skill
item.description: A guide to the handoff skill for compacting context so another agent or session can continue cleanly.
item.content:encoded: A guide to the handoff skill for compacting context so another agent or session can continue cleanly.

item.title: The /tdd Skill
item.description: A guide to Matt Pocock's tdd skill for implementing features one behavior at a time.
item.content:encoded: A guide to Matt Pocock's tdd skill for implementing features one behavior at a time.

item.title: The /to-tickets Skill
item.description: A guide to the to-issues skill for turning plans and PRDs into tracer-bullet implementation issues.
item.content:encoded: A guide to the to-issues skill for turning plans and PRDs into tracer-bullet implementation issues.

item.title: The /to-spec Skill
item.description: A guide to the to-prd skill for creating a PRD from current conversation and codebase context.
item.content:encoded: A guide to the to-prd skill for creating a PRD from current conversation and codebase context.

item.title: grill-with-docs: Align Before You Build
item.description: Learn /grill-with-docs: combine AI interviewing with domain-driven design to build better codebases with shared language and less repetition.
item.content:encoded: Learn /grill-with-docs: combine AI interviewing with domain-driven design to build better codebases with shared language and less repetition.

item.title: v1: 63% Token Reduction, /ask-matt, /writing-great-skills
item.description: Skills v1.0 update: 63% token reduction, new routing skills, domain modeling & codebase design. Install with npx now.
item.content:encoded: Skills v1.0 update: 63% token reduction, new routing skills, domain modeling & codebase design. Install with npx now.

item.title: Learn Anything With My /teach Skill
item.description: Learn to use the /teach skill in Claude Code to create personalized AI-powered lessons on anything—languages, coding, skills—with interactive exercises.
item.content:encoded: Learn to use the /teach skill in Claude Code to create personalized AI-powered lessons on anything—languages, coding, skills—with interactive exercises.

item.title: 9 Things People Get Wrong With /grill-me and /grill-with-docs
item.description: Master the 9 most common mistakes when using /grill-me or /grill-with-docs. Learn scope management, model selection, and planning strategies.
item.content:encoded: Master the 9 most common mistakes when using /grill-me or /grill-with-docs. Learn scope management, model selection, and planning strategies.

item.title: 17 Techniques For Improving Your LLM-Powered App
item.description: A directory of techniques for improving your LLM-powered app.
item.content:encoded: A directory of techniques for improving your LLM-powered app.

item.title: AI Hero Newsletter by Matt Pocock
item.description: Subscribe to be the first to learn about AI Hero releases, updates, and special discounts for AI Heroes.
item.content:encoded: Subscribe to be the first to learn about AI Hero releases, updates, and special discounts for AI Heroes.

item.title: AI Skills for Real Engineers
item.description: A practical skill system for engineers who want to use AI without giving up their standards.
item.content:encoded: A practical skill system for engineers who want to use AI without giving up their standards.

item.title: Skills Newsletter
item.description: A practical skill system for engineers who want to use AI without giving up their standards.
item.content:encoded: A practical skill system for engineers who want to use AI without giving up their standards.

item.title: Skills Changelog: /handoff, /prototype, /review and /writing
item.description: Two new AI agent skills: /handoff for passing context between agents, and /prototype for building throwaway prototypes to test design decisions.
item.content:encoded: Two new AI agent skills: /handoff for passing context between agents, and /prototype for building throwaway prototypes to test design decisions.

item.title: Skills Changelog: Ubiquitous Language -> /grill-with-docs
item.description: Skills repo changelog: /grill-with-docs, ADRs, improved architecture language, multi-tracker support & new debugging skills. Updates inside.
item.content:encoded: Skills repo changelog: /grill-with-docs, ADRs, improved architecture language, multi-tracker support & new debugging skills. Updates inside.

item.title: Skills Changelog: Ubiquitous Language -> /grill-with-docs
item.description: Skills repo changelog: /grill-with-docs, ADRs, improved architecture language, multi-tracker support & new debugging skills. Updates inside.
item.content:encoded: Skills repo changelog: /grill-with-docs, ADRs, improved architecture language, multi-tracker support & new debugging skills. Updates inside.

item.title: My 'Grill Me' Skill Went Viral
item.description: Learn the "Grill Me" AI skill—a powerful technique to deeply explore coding plans, requirements, and ideas through structured AI conversations.
item.content:encoded: Learn the "Grill Me" AI skill—a powerful technique to deeply explore coding plans, requirements, and ideas through structured AI conversations.

item.title: Real-world feature build with Claude Code: every step explained
item.description: Learn Claude Code workflow: grill sessions, PRDs, GitHub issues, AFK agents, and QA loops for building features efficiently with AI.
item.content:encoded: Learn Claude Code workflow: grill sessions, PRDs, GitHub issues, AFK agents, and QA loops for building features efficiently with AI.

item.title: 5 Agent Skills I Use Every Day
item.description: Master AI code quality with proven engineering skills: prompt techniques, TDD, architecture design, and PRD workflows for Claude Code agents.
item.content:encoded: Master AI code quality with proven engineering skills: prompt techniques, TDD, architecture design, and PRD workflows for Claude Code agents.

item.title: My 7 Phases Of AI Development
item.description: Master the 7 phases of AI-assisted development with Claude Code. Learn how to ship production-quality code using research, prototyping, PRDs, and more.
item.content:encoded: Master the 7 phases of AI-assisted development with Claude Code. Learn how to ship production-quality code using research, prototyping, PRDs, and more.

item.title: My Claude Code Cohort - A Teaser
item.description: Here's a teaser to my Claude Code course: covering LLM constraints, planning, steering, feedback loops, autonomous agents, and human-in-the-loop techniques.
item.content:encoded: Here's a teaser to my Claude Code course: covering LLM constraints, planning, steering, feedback loops, autonomous agents, and human-in-the-loop techniques.

item.title: 9 Ways AI Coding Has Rewired My Brain
item.description: Discover 9 ways AI-assisted coding rewires your development mindset: integration testing, architecture, modules, and strategies for managing cognitive load.
item.content:encoded: Discover 9 ways AI-assisted coding rewires your development mindset: integration testing, architecture, modules, and strategies for managing cognitive load.

item.title: How To Make Codebases AI Agents Love
item.description: Learn how deep modules and proper codebase architecture make AI coding more effective. Master software design principles for AI-ready codebases.
item.content:encoded: Learn how deep modules and proper codebase architecture make AI coding more effective. Master software design principles for AI-ready codebases.

item.title: How To Use Claude Code Hooks To Enforce The Right CLI
item.description: Learn how to use Claude Code hooks to prevent unwanted CLI commands and guide your AI coding agent to use the right tools instead of CLAUDE.md.
item.content:encoded: Learn how to use Claude Code hooks to prevent unwanted CLI commands and guide your AI coding agent to use the right tools instead of CLAUDE.md.

item.title: Never Run Claude /init
item.description: Learn why auto-generated Claude.md files hurt your coding agents and what to use instead for better performance and lower costs.
item.content:encoded: Learn why auto-generated Claude.md files hurt your coding agents and what to use instead for better performance and lower costs.

item.title: This Hook Stops Claude Code Running Dangerous Git Commands
item.description: Learn how to block dangerous git commands in Claude Code using a PreToolUse hook. Prevent accidental data loss with git guardrails.
item.content:encoded: Learn how to block dangerous git commands in Claude Code using a PreToolUse hook. Prevent accidental data loss with git guardrails.

item.title: My Skill Makes Claude Code GREAT At TDD
item.description: Here's my TDD skill for getting Claude to write honest tests and real implementations using red-green-refactor and vertical slicing.
item.content:encoded: Here's my TDD skill for getting Claude to write honest tests and real implementations using red-green-refactor and vertical slicing.

item.title: Why the Anthropic Ralph plugin sucks (use a bash loop instead)
item.description: Discover why the Anthropic Ralph plugin degrades AI performance by filling up context windows. Learn why bash loops keep Claude in the smart zone instead.
item.content:encoded: Discover why the Anthropic Ralph plugin degrades AI performance by filling up context windows. Learn why bash loops keep Claude in the smart zone instead.

item.title: Tracer Bullets: Keeping AI Slop Under Control
item.description: Learn how tracer bullets can help you control AI code quality by building small, end-to-end features and getting feedback early instead of bloated solutions.
item.content:encoded: Learn how tracer bullets can help you control AI code quality by building small, end-to-end features and getting feedback early instead of bloated solutions.

item.title: Here's How To Stream Claude Code With AFK Ralph
item.description: Stream Claude code in real-time while running AFK Ralph. Learn how to use jq to get visibility into Claude's output instead of staring at a blank screen.
item.content:encoded: Stream Claude code in real-time while running AFK Ralph. Learn how to use jq to get visibility into Claude's output instead of staring at a blank screen.
